main.description: Owner's skytip-simple tip/subscription limits, stored on their PDS.

minTipAmount.description: Minimum tip in cents. Defaults to 100 ($1.00) if absent.

maxTipAmount.description: Maximum tip in cents. No upper cap if absent.

suggestedTipAmount.description: Pre-selected tip in cents. Falls back to minTipAmount if absent.

minSubscriptionAmount.description: Minimum monthly subscription in cents. Defaults to 100 ($1.00) if absent.

maxSubscriptionAmount.description: Maximum monthly subscription in cents. No upper cap if absent.

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code. Defaults to USD if absent.

alwaysPrivate.description: If true, all tips and subscriptions are forced private; the visitor-facing checkbox is hidden.
